name: Hot and Sweet Mustard
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the mustard and sugar in the top of a double boiler.
2. Gradually whisk in the vinegar, then the egg.
3. Set over simmering water and cook until the mixture darkens slightly and mellows in flavor, stirring frequently for about 12 minutes.
4. Transfer to a jar with a tight-fitting lid.
5. Refrigerate mustard until ready to use. (Can be prepared up to 4 weeks ahead.)
